name: codex-auto-memory
description: Claude-style auto memory for Codex, implemented as a local companion CLI.

scripts.test:cli-smoke: vitest run test/audit.test.ts test/hooks-command.test.ts test/integrations-command.test.ts test/mcp-command.test.ts test/skills-command.test.ts test/memory-command.test.ts test/recall-command.test.ts test/session-command.test.ts test/wrapper-session-continuity.test.ts
scripts.test:reviewer-smoke: vitest run test/docs-contract.test.ts test/hooks-command.test.ts test/integrations-command.test.ts test/mcp-command.test.ts test/skills-command.test.ts test/memory-command.test.ts test/recall-command.test.ts test/session-command.test.ts test/wrapper-session-continuity.test.ts test/session-continuity.test.ts
scripts.verify:release: pnpm lint && pnpm test:docs-contract && pnpm test:reviewer-smoke && pnpm test:cli-smoke && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm test:dist-cli-smoke && pnpm pack:check && pnpm test:tarball-install-smoke
